category_sources: Official PDM docs describe PDM as a Python package and dependency manager: https://pdm-project.org/en/latest/.
source_facts.description: Modern Python package and dependency manager supporting the latest PEP standards.
display_name_sources: Official documentation header and logo use PDM: https://pdm-project.org/en/latest/.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official PDM documentation site; official docs are available at https://pdm-project.org/en/latest/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PDM docs link to GitHub, and GitHub repository is pdm-project/pdm: https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states Python package and dependency manager; official docs list packaging and dependency-management features: https://pdm-project.org/en/latest/.
